title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Bids and Awards Committee (BAC) Resolution No. 2020-032 Dated June 17, 2020, Resolution Recommending the Cancellation of the Project, Supply and Delivery of Sporting Goods in Support for Various Sports Program, Los Baños, Laguna Due to the Restriction and Suspension of Sports Activities in Relation to the Imposition of Community Quarantine Because of Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) Pandemic. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ 07/06/2020)
